name: Compare workers comp vs personal injury lawsuit for warehouse accident?
description: Comp easier/no-fault; suit for more $$ vs 3rd parties.[4]

mainEntity.name: Compare workers comp vs personal injury lawsuit for warehouse accident?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp easier/no-fault; suit for more $$ vs 3rd parties.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Comp: quick, no-fault, limited benefits; lawsuit: fault-based, higher potential but harder.** Comp exclusive vs employer.[1][4]

| Aspect | Workers' Comp | Personal Injury |
|--------|---------------|-----------------|
| Fault | No | Yes |
| Benefits | Med/lost wages | All damages |
| Time | Faster | Years |[3]
